zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Berners於1388年6月1日出生在英國素瑞易亞斯特 霍斯利時，他的父親Sir James Berners27歲，母親Anne Briwere Barew23歲。他於1409年6月1日之前與Philippa Dalyngruge結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1421年8月6日在他的家鄉享年33歲，埋葬在英國素瑞傑千。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Berners于1388年6月1日出生在英国素瑞易亞斯特 霍斯利时，他的父亲Sir James Berners27岁，母亲Anne Briwere Barew23岁。他于1409年6月1日之前与Philippa Dalyngruge结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1421年8月6日在他的家乡享年33岁，埋葬在英国素瑞傑千。

nameMeanings.name: Berners
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Bernières (Calvados).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Berners was born on 1 June 1388, in East Horsley, Surrey, England, his father, Sir James Berners, was 27 and his mother, Anne Briwere Barew, was 23. He married Philippa Dalyngruge before 1 June 1409. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 6 August 1421, in his hometown, at the age of 33, and was buried in Chertsey, Surrey, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Berners est né le 1 juin 1388, à East Horsley, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, Sir James Berners, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Anne Briwere Barew, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Philippa Dalyngruge avant 1 juin 1409. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 6 août 1421, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterré à Chertsey, Surrey, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Berners am 1. Juni 1388 in East Horsley, Surrey, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir James Berners 27 und seine Mutter Anne Briwere Barew 23. Er hat vor 1. Juni 1409 Philippa Dalyngruge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 6. August 1421 im Alter von 33 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Chertsey, Surrey, England begraben.

Lui sposato Philippa Dalyngruge prima del 1 giugno 1409. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 6 agosto 1421, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 33 anni, e fu sepolto a Chertsey, Surrey, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Bernersが1388年6月1日にイギリススリーエアスト ホールスリーで生まれた時，父Sir James Bernersは27歳，母Anne Briwere Barewは23歳であった。1409年6月1日以前にPhilippa Dalyngrugeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1421年8月6日に故郷で33歳で死去し，イギリススリーチェルトセイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Berners(이)가 1388년 6월 1일 영국 수리 이스트 호르슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir James Berners(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Briwere Barew(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1409년 6월 1일 이전 Philippa Dalyngruge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1421년 8월 6일 그의 고향에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수리 처츠이에 묻혔다.

pt.West Horsley, Surrey, England: West Horsley, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Berners nasceu em 1 de junho de 1388, em East Horsley, Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir James Berners, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Anne Briwere Barew, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Philippa Dalyngruge antes 1 de junho de 1409. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 6 de agosto de 1421, em sua cidade natal, com 33 anos, e foi sepultado em Chertsey, Surrey, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Berners родился 1 июня 1388 г. в местности эаст хаурсли, сурри, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir James Berners было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Briwere Barew, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Philippa Dalyngruge перед 1 июнь 1409 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 6 августа 1421 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 33 лет и был похоронен в местности чирци, сурри, Англия.

Se casó con Philippa Dalyngruge antes de 1 de junio de 1409. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
